privileged_info_summary: The task involves updating practice information for practice_id=1 (Hillside Family Medicine) in a NOSH ChartingSystem. The practice must be updated with new contact details: street address '250 Elm Street, Suite 300', city 'Northampton', zip '01060', phone '413-555-9876', fax '413-555-9877', and email 'office@hillsidefm.com'. The practice name and state (MA) must be preserved unchanged. Initial database state is reset to: address '100 Main St', city 'Springfield', zip '01101', phone '413-555-1234', fax '413-555-5678', email 'admin@hillsidefm.local' before each task execution.
